findings.summary: 13 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #root > div > button:nth-of-type(1) (contrast 2.37), #root > div > div > button:nth-of-type(1) (contrast 1.49), #root > div > div > button:nth-of-type(2) (contrast 1.26), #root > div > div > button:nth-of-type(3) (contrast 1.26), #root > div > div > button:nth-of-type(4) (contrast 1.54)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.

findings.summary: No "skip to main content" style link was found among the first focus stops.
findings.persona_impact: A keyboard user must Tab through the entire header/nav to reach main content on every page — painful for users with limited stamina or motor control.
